narrative:
Rocky River-03-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,220 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
